shortDescription: Home Affairs · Subclass 600 · Tourism, family, business · Genuine visitor

policyAlert.summary: Confirm current Subclass 600 visa fee (AUD $195 approx for Tourist stream) on homeaffairs.gov.au before quoting.

alert.title: Genuine temporary entrant
alert.body: Officers must be satisfied applicant will leave Australia after visit. Weak ties to India remain the top refusal reason.

about.label: Description
about.value: Subclass 600 visitor visa for tourism, visiting family, or short business visits to Australia. Applied online via ImmiAccount with stream selection.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Temporary visit purpose · Funds for stay · Strong ties to India · Genuine intention to depart · Health and character requirements

about.label: Stream selection
about.value: Tourist, Sponsored Family, Business Visitor streams have different evidence needs. Choose correctly at application.

about.label: After approval
about.value: Respect stay period and visa conditions. No work except limited business visitor activities. Overstay affects future visas.

redFlagsBanner: After refusal, review grounds and strengthen ties evidence before reapplication—do not resubmit unchanged profile.

redFlags.title: Weak ties to India
redFlags.description: No employment, assets, or family obligations documented.
redFlags.fix: Employment letter, business proof, property, family dependencies

redFlags.title: Insufficient funds
redFlags.description: Cannot credibly fund trip or recent large deposits unexplained.
redFlags.fix: Bank history, ITR, sponsor letter with host support

redFlags.title: Wrong stream selected
redFlags.description: Family visit applied as tourist without invitation.
redFlags.fix: Match stream to purpose; Sponsored Family if applicable

redFlags.title: Prior refusals hidden
redFlags.description: Australia or other refusals not disclosed.

redFlags.title: Long stay without reason
redFlags.description: 3-month tourism with weak ties raises concern.
redFlags.fix: Realistic itinerary; explain duration; strong return evidence

redFlags.title: Generic cover letter
redFlags.fix: Personalised statement with dates, purpose, ties

faqs.q: Can we guarantee visitor visa approval?
faqs.a: No. Home Affairs decides each case. We improve documentation but never promise approval.
Sponsored Family stream if eligible with eligible sponsor in Australia; otherwise Tourist stream with invitation.
Enough for flights, accommodation, and daily expenses for planned stay. No fixed amount—must be credible.
No paid work. Limited business visitor activities only on appropriate stream.

faqs.q: Can visitor switch to student visa in Australia?
faqs.a: Generally must apply from outside Australia for student visa—verify current rules.
Must disclose. Success requires materially improved circumstances.
Depends on profile and stay—follow Home Affairs health requirements.
Officer grants stay period—often up to 3, 6, or 12 months depending on stream and case.

compliance: Client service agreement on file before submission
Do not advise working in Australia on visitor visa
proTips: Personalise cover letter to visit purpose
For family visits, collect sponsor Form 1149 if Sponsored Family stream
Show employment leave letter for salaried applicants
postApproval: Explain granted stay period and conditions
Note reapplication rules if purpose changes

staffNotes.author: Documentation team
staffNotes.text: Parents visiting children—collect child's visa status proof and strong India ties for parent.

quiz.question: Top refusal reason for Indian visitors:
quiz.explanation: Must satisfy officer of temporary intent.

quiz.question: Visitor visa holders generally:
quiz.explanation: Work not permitted on visitor visa.

quiz.question: Family visits may use:
options: Sponsored Family or Tourist stream as eligible

dos: Select correct stream for visit purpose
donts: Do not advise working in Australia
Do not use generic cover letter
Do not overstate stay without reason
